admin-panel.name: Admin Panel
admin-panel.description: In-game admin dashboard with a navigation home screen. Give Items, Players (teleport/heal/kick/ban), and Server quick commands.
admin-panel.longDescription: Opens a compact CUI dashboard in-game (/ap or /adminpanel). Home screen navigation tiles: Give Items (browse 11 categories, give to any player), Players (teleport to/from, heal, strip, kick, ban), Server (save, set day/night, clear weather, supply drop, heal all). Built-in spam protection with per-player cooldowns. Requires the myrconadminpanel.use permission.

black-market.name: Black Market
black-market.description: Interactable Black Market NPC shop. Place an invincible, non-combat vendor NPC; players press USE to open a shop and buy items with scrap.
black-market.longDescription: Spawns a stationary bandit-shopkeeper-style NPC that can't be killed and won't fight back. Players press USE on the NPC to open the Black Market UI and buy configurable items with scrap (or any currency item you set). Admins place NPCs where they stand with /blackmarket place and remove the nearest with /blackmarket remove — placements persist across restarts. Shop items, prices, amounts and the currency are all editable in the config.

noclip.name: NoClip
noclip.description: Let permitted players toggle noclip (fly through walls and terrain) with /noclip.
noclip.longDescription: Grants a /noclip chat command (and myrcon.noclip console command) to players with the myrconnoclip.use permission. Non-admins are temporarily elevated so the client accepts the noclip command, then reverted automatically when they toggle it off or disconnect — no permanent admin flag is left behind. Grant the permission from the Exclusive Plugins → Manage screen.

structure-iq.name: StructureIQ
structure-iq.description: PvE server structure analytics. Scan bases, track entity counts, score performance impact, check build limits, and inspect ownership confidence.
structure-iq.longDescription: Scans every player-built structure (TC-anchored) in a single server pass. Counts building blocks, doors, containers, turrets, electrical, industrial, signs, vending machines, and vehicles. Produces a StructureIQ performance score (0–100) and a PvE rule status (OK / Warning / Severe) based on configurable limits. Identifies ownership with a confidence rating. Feeds the MyRCON StructureIQ panel: Overview, Structures, Owners, Hotspots, Limits, Protected, and Notes tabs. Admin notes and protection flags persist across scans. Safe for active PvE servers — read-only analysis, no automatic deletions.

reclaim.name: Reclaim
reclaim.description: PvE server cleanup and abandoned asset management. Detect abandoned bases, unused vehicles, and orphaned deployables.
reclaim.longDescription: Tracks player last-seen times, entity interactions (loot, doors, vehicle mounts), and runs on-demand scans to classify every TC-covered base, vehicle, and standalone deployable on the server. Results feed directly into the MyRCON Reclaim panel. Admins can protect, ignore, or delete flagged assets individually. Optional auto-cleanup (off by default) targets only Low-risk CleanupReady assets. Player warning system notifies owners on next login before any action is taken. Requires myrconreclaim.admin permission.
